hero.subtitle: Tracks your thesis, monitors positions, and tells you when reality diverges from your plan. Powered by a multi-agent analysis engine with walk-forward backtesting.
hero.credibility.highlight: 10+ years in quantitative finance & systematic trading
hero.stats.agents.label: AI Agents
hero.stats.tests.label: Tests
hero.stats.endpoints.label: API Endpoints
hero.stats.backtest.label: Backtest Range
hero.highlights.title: Walk-forward backtested · 6 tickers · 2020–2025
hero.highlights.btc.detail: -76.6% → -40.7% while capturing 92% of returns. Avoided Luna crash & FTX collapse.
hero.highlights.spy.detail: -34.1% → -18.7%. Exited before the 2020 crash and 2022 rate hike cycle.
hero.highlights.agents.detail: Technical + Fundamental + Macro + Crypto — each scores independently, then aggregated with adaptive EWMA weights.
hero.highlights.adaptive.detail: Adaptive weight optimizer tracks agent accuracy over time. Threshold grid search finds optimal BUY/SELL levels per ticker.
features.title: Everything you need to stay ahead
features.subtitle: A self-hosted analysis system that combines rule-based agents, continuous monitoring, and rigorous backtesting.
features.multiAgent.title: Multi-Agent Analysis
features.multiAgent.desc: 4 specialized agents — Technical, Fundamental, Macro, and Crypto — analyze every position from different angles, then aggregate into a single weighted signal.
features.thesis.title: Thesis Tracking
features.thesis.desc: Record your investment thesis at entry. Track expected vs actual ROI over time. Drift detection alerts you when your thesis no longer holds.
features.monitoring.title: Continuous Monitoring
features.monitoring.desc: Background daemon watches your positions 24/7. Alerts on price targets, significant drawdowns, signal reversals, and stop-loss triggers.
features.backtest.title: Walk-Forward Backtesting
features.backtest.desc: Validate signals against 5 years of historical data. Point-in-time safe engine prevents look-ahead bias. Batch compare across tickers and agent combos.
screenshots.title: See it in action
screenshots.subtitle: Key workflows captured from the live application.
screenshots.analysis.label: Multi-Agent Analysis
screenshots.analysis.caption: Enter any ticker to get a full breakdown — agent signals, confidence donut, key metrics, and price history chart.
screenshots.backtest.label: Walk-Forward Backtest
screenshots.backtest.caption: 5-year equity curve with signal markers, separate price chart, win rate, Sharpe ratio, and full trade log.
screenshots.dashboard.label: Dashboard Overview
screenshots.dashboard.caption: Portfolio allocation donut, P&L metrics, recent alerts, and signal summary — all at a glance.
screenshots.monitoring.label: Position Monitoring
screenshots.monitoring.caption: Real-time alert feed with severity colors. Price target hits, significant gains/losses, signal reversals.
arch.title: How it works
arch.subtitle: A clean pipeline from data ingestion to actionable signals. Self-hosted, no vendor lock-in, no LLM cost in the core loop.
arch.diff.selfHosted.title: Self-Hosted
arch.diff.selfHosted.desc: Runs on your machine. Your data stays local. No cloud dependency, no subscription fees.
arch.diff.ruleBased.title: Rule-Based Core
arch.diff.ruleBased.desc: No LLM tokens burned in the analysis loop. Claude integration planned for Phase 3 catalyst scanning only.
arch.diff.thesis.title: Thesis Accountability
arch.diff.thesis.desc: The moat: expected vs actual ROI dual-track. Know when your thesis breaks before your portfolio does.
footer.name: Investment Agent
footer.tagline: The investment journal that fights back
